title: shelff Tag Order
description: Display ordering for tags. Stored at .shelff/tags.json in the shelff documents directory. Note: this file only defines the display order of tags. The canonical set of tags is derived by scanning all sidecar files; tags not listed here are appended in alphabetical order.

version.description: Schema version. Must be 1 for this version of the specification.

tagOrder.description: Tag names in display order. Tags present in sidecar files but absent from this list are appended in alphabetical order.
